app.name: SpectaQL
app.one_liner: A Node.js library that autogenerates static, modern, and customizable documentation for GraphQL APIs.

screens.name: Documentation Viewer
screens.purpose: Display generated GraphQL API documentation in a responsive three-column layout.

rust_commands.name: generate_docs
rust_commands.purpose: Generate static GraphQL documentation from configured schema input sources.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core schema ingestion from introspection or SDL
week 1: Render basic three-column documentation UI
week 1: Set up project scaffolding with Node.js tooling
acceptance_tests: Given a live GraphQL endpoint, SpectaQL generates complete static documentation via introspection.
Given SDL files as input, SpectaQL produces accurate and navigable documentation.
